methods.ArrayNode arrayNode(): Factory method that constructs and returns an empty ArrayNode Construction is done using registered JsonNodeFactory.
methods.String asText(): Method that will return a valid String representation of the container value, if the node is a value node (method JsonNode.isValueNode() returns true), otherwise empty String.
methods.com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonToken asT: Method that can be used for efficient type detection when using stream abstraction for traversing nodes.
methods.BinaryNode binaryNode(byte[] data): Factory method for constructing a binary node that will contain given byte array as is.
methods.BinaryNode binaryNode(byte[] data, int o: Factory method for constructing a binary node that will contain given byte array as is.
methods.BooleanNode booleanNode(boolean v): Factory method for constructing a boolean node that will contain given boolean value.
methods.JsonNode get(int index): Method for accessing value of the specified element of an array node.
methods.JsonNode get(String fieldName): Method for accessing value of the specified field of an object node.
methods.NullNode nullNode(): Factory method that returns the singleton NullNode instance.
methods.NumericNode numberNode(BigDecimal v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given BigDecimal value.
methods.NumericNode numberNode(BigInteger v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given BigInteger value.
methods.NumericNode numberNode(byte v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given byte value.
methods.ValueNode numberNode(Byte v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given Byte value.
methods.NumericNode numberNode(double v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given double value.
methods.ValueNode numberNode(Double v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given Double value.
methods.NumericNode numberNode(float v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given float value.
methods.ValueNode numberNode(Float v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given Float value.
methods.NumericNode numberNode(int v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given int value.
methods.ValueNode numberNode(Integer v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given Integer value.
methods.NumericNode numberNode(long v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given long value.
methods.ValueNode numberNode(Long v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given Long value.
methods.NumericNode numberNode(short v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given short value.
methods.ValueNode numberNode(Short v): Factory method for constructing a numeric node that will contain given Short value.
methods.ObjectNode objectNode(): Factory method that constructs and returns an empty ObjectNode Construction is done using registered JsonNodeFactory.
methods.ValueNode pojoNode(Object pojo): Factory method to use for adding POJO ("Plain Old Java Object" aka "bean") values; these will be serialized using standard Jackson data binding mechanisms.
methods.ValueNode rawValueNode(RawValue value): Factory method to use for adding "raw values"; pre-encoded values that are included exactly as-is when node is serialized.
methods.T removeAll(): Method for removing all children container has (if any)
methods.int size(): Method for accessing number of children this container has (if any)
methods.TextNode textNode(String text): Factory method for constructing a TextNode with given text content.
